data.content: Shipment review approved. All acceptance criteria verified: (1) clicking the version pill triggers checkForUpdates via /api/version?force=1, (2) update-available state renders 'Update now to v{latestVersion}', (3) up-to-date state renders 'Latest version installed'. Scope limited to version-badge.tsx and its test file. CI green (runs 23633825757, 23633825758). Typecheck clean, 2257 tests pass, no lint errors in changed files. Commits tagged: 27cf50d62f60 (feature), 274b1de5ba9c (merge), d4025cae1776 (lint fix).
